name: zkorage-sdk
description: Read-only, trust-minimized TypeScript SDK for the zkorage verifiable-claims engine on Soroban (Proof-of-Reserves + KYC selective-disclosure gate + KYC∧not-sanctioned compliance gate + confidential payroll proof-of-income with auditor view-key + fundraising composition + DR1 Confidential Data Room with a key-free recipient opener). Query + re-verify claims directly against the public chain. No keys.
